en.title: Pet Behaviorist
en.prompt: I want you to act as a pet behaviorist. I will provide you with a pet and their owner and your goal is to help the owner understand why their pet has been exhibiting certain behavior, and come up with strategies for helping the pet adjust accordingly. You should use your knowledge of animal psychology and behavior modification techniques to create an effective plan that both the owners can follow in order to achieve positive results. My first request is [pet type and behavior issue]

metaDescription: Pet issues? Understand behavior and get modification strategies. Create effective plans for positive changes in your pet.

faq.q: Can the AI solve dog behavior issues like biting or chewing?
faq.a: It can give standard training advice (positive reinforcement, replacement behaviors), but serious aggression (unprovoked biting, car chasing) requires an in-person behaviorist assessment. The AI can't see your pet's body language and interaction details.

faq.q: Can I consult it about diet and weight issues?
faq.a: General principles (calorie counting, exercise levels) are fine as reference, but breed-specific and disease-specific diets require a licensed vet. The AI doesn't know your pet's medical history or allergens, and generic advice can sometimes be risky.
